sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = event_date + INTERVAL '10 days' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datepart('month', event_date) AS month_part FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, datepart('year', event_date + INTERVAL '6 months') AS adjusted_year_part FROM test_dates;
